title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Curriculum Developer in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
